name: LoanMax Title Loans
description_short: Louisville, KY's LoanMax Title Loans at 7122 Dixie Hwy offers quick title loans weekdays 10AM-6PM, Saturday 9AM-2PM.
description_long:
The LoanMax Title Loans location in Louisville is situated at 7122 Dixie Hwy, making it accessible to residents throughout the south Louisville area. This standalone storefront is designed specifically for quick, convenient access to emergency title loans. The office operates Monday through Friday from 10AM to 6PM and offers Saturday hours from 9AM to 2PM for those who need weekend service, with the location closed on Sundays.

At this Louisville location, LoanMax Title Loans specializes in same-day and fast title loans for customers who own their vehicle. The team here accepts applications for title loans based on vehicle equity, with funding that can be available as quickly as the same day in many cases. For details on loan amounts, terms, and requirements specific to this Louisville, KY branch, call 502-306-9900 during business hours.

If you're a Louisville resident facing an unexpected expense and own a vehicle, this Dixie Hwy location offers a faster alternative to traditional lending. Bring valid government-issued ID, proof of residence, vehicle registration, and proof of insurance when you visit to speed up the application process.
pros: Loans up to $10,000 available with same-day or next-day funding for emergency cash needs
25+ year operating history (founded 1990) with multi-state licensed operations
Transparent state-by-state compliance documentation including licenses, fee schedules, and complaint procedures
Multiple payment methods accepted: cash, check, debit card, Western Union, and online payment options
Multiple Michigan locations within Detroit metro area (5 branches listed) for convenient access
Clear application requirements: vehicle, photo ID, and clear title only—no credit check required
Licensed and regulated by state financial authorities with published complaint procedures for each state
cons: Vehicle title held as collateral—risk of repossession if loan not repaid on schedule
Title loans are high-cost short-term debt products; APR and specific fee schedules not disclosed on main website
Limited information on website about loan terms, repayment periods, or total cost of borrowing
Loan amounts subject to vehicle evaluation, meaning actual approval amount may be less than requested
Product inherently targets financially vulnerable populations with limited credit access, raising predatory lending concerns
best_for: Consumers with vehicle equity who need $1,000–$10,000 in emergency cash within days
Borrowers with poor or no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
Those facing short-term financial gaps (medical bills, car repairs, utility bills) who own a vehicle outright
diagnosis: LoanMax Title Loans is designed for consumers facing immediate financial emergencies who have vehicle equity but lack access to traditional credit. The key caveat: title loans are high-cost short-term debt products that put vehicle ownership at risk if repayment is missed. Borrowers should only pursue this option if they can repay within the loan term and have exhausted lower-cost alternatives like credit union PALs or emergency assistance programs.
services: Auto title loans up to $10,000 secured by vehicle equity
Same-day or next-day cash funding upon approval
Online loan application and account registration
Multiple payment method acceptance: cash, check, debit card, Western Union
Vehicle title evaluation and loan amount determination
State-specific consumer disclosures and compliance documentation
Phone and in-person application assistance at physical locations
FAQ and educational resources on how title loans work
meta_description: Louisville, KY title loans at LoanMax (7122 Dixie Hwy) – same-day funding available. Open Mon-Fri 10AM-6PM, Sat 9AM-2PM.
